item.title: 8.3]【睡眠測試】你累的真正原因！教你算出你真正的「睡眠時間表」！
item.itunes:title: 8.3]【睡眠測試】你累的真正原因！教你算出你真正的「睡眠時間表」！
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h3MsbIY9jpI 你總是感覺累累的嗎？可能是你睡錯時間了！了解你的生物鐘，找到適合自己的睡眠時間表，能幫助你改善白天的精力不足，擺脫頭痛、小感冒等問題。馬修·埃德隆博士指出，充足的睡眠對控制體重、記憶、學習等都至關重要。快來測試你的睡眠類型，調整睡眠時間，讓你每天醒來都神清氣爽吧！ ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 我的網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:37 什麼事睡眠債 04:02 如何計算你的睡眠類型？ 07:49 如何計算你真正的睡眠時間 10:10 想做卻做不到呢？ 11:23 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27775095/ | Estimating individual optimal sleep duration and potential sleep debt - PubMed https://www.healthline.com/health/dr/sleep-deprivation/sleep-debt | Sleep Debt: What It Means for Your Health and How You Can Pay It Off https://www.health.harvard.edu/blog/weekend-catch-up-sleep-wont-fix-the-effects-of-sleep-deprivation-on-your-waistline-2019092417861 | https://www.sleepfoundation.org/sleep-deprivation | Sleep Deprivation: Symptoms, Treatment, \u0026 Effects https://www.sleepfoundation.org/how-sleep-works/sleep-debt-and-catch-up-sleep | Sleep Debt: The Hidden Cost of Insufficient Rest https://www.verywellhealth.com/what-is-sleep-debt-and-can-you-catch-up-on-it-3015091#:~:text=Many%20people%20catch%20up%20on,reduce%20an%20accumulated%20sleep%20debt. | https://www.webmd.com/sleep-disorders/what-is-sleep-debt | Sleep Debt: What Is It, Consequences, and More https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/fact-or-fiction-can-you-catch-up-on-sleep/ | https://www.nhlbi.nih.gov/health/sleep-deprivation/how-much-sleep#:~:text=If%20you%20regularly%20lose%20sleep,nap%20to%20deal%20with%20sleepiness. | https://www.cite.com.my/product_info.php?products_id=1425854 | 究極休息術：重新設定身心的30天休息計畫 - 城邦阅读花园
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h3MsbIY9jpI 你總是感覺累累的嗎？可能是你睡錯時間了！了解你的生物鐘，找到適合自己的睡眠時間表，能幫助你改善白天的精力不足，擺脫頭痛、小感冒等問題。馬修·埃德隆博士指出，充足的睡眠對控制體重、記憶、學習等都至關重要。快來測試你的睡眠類型，調整睡眠時間，讓你每天醒來都神清氣爽吧！ ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 我的網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:37 什麼事睡眠債 04:02 如何計算你的睡眠類型？ 07:49 如何計算你真正的睡眠時間 10:10 想做卻做不到呢？ 11:23 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27775095/ | Estimating individual optimal sleep duration and potential sleep debt - PubMed https://www.healthline.com/health/dr/sleep-deprivation/sleep-debt | Sleep Debt: What It Means for Your Health and How You Can Pay It Off https://www.health.harvard.edu/blog/weekend-catch-up-sleep-wont-fix-the-effects-of-sleep-deprivation-on-your-waistline-2019092417861 | https://www.sleepfoundation.org/sleep-deprivation | Sleep Deprivation: Symptoms, Treatment, \u0026 Effects https://www.sleepfoundation.org/how-sleep-works/sleep-debt-and-catch-up-sleep | Sleep Debt: The Hidden Cost of Insufficient Rest https://www.verywellhealth.com/what-is-sleep-debt-and-can-you-catch-up-on-it-3015091#:~:text=Many%20people%20catch%20up%20on,reduce%20an%20accumulated%20sleep%20debt. | https://www.webmd.com/sleep-disorders/what-is-sleep-debt | Sleep Debt: What Is It, Consequences, and More https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/fact-or-fiction-can-you-catch-up-on-sleep/ | https://www.nhlbi.nih.gov/health/sleep-deprivation/how-much-sleep#:~:text=If%20you%20regularly%20lose%20sleep,nap%20to%20deal%20with%20sleepiness. | https://www.cite.com.my/product_info.php?products_id=1425854 | 究極休息術：重新設定身心的30天休息計畫 - 城邦阅读花园
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h3MsbIY9jpI
你總是感覺累累的嗎？可能是你睡錯時間了！了解你的生物鐘，找到適合自己的睡眠時間表，能幫助你改善白天的精力不足，擺脫頭痛、小感冒等問題。馬修·埃德隆博士指出，充足的睡眠對控制體重、記憶、學習等都至關重要。快來測試你的睡眠類型，調整睡眠時間，讓你每天醒來都神清氣爽吧！

------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

我的網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com


【目錄】
00:00 引言
01:37 什麼事睡眠債
04:02 如何計算你的睡眠類型？
07:49 如何計算你真正的睡眠時間
10:10 想做卻做不到呢？
11:23 精選留言

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27775095/ | Estimating individual optimal sleep duration and potential sleep debt - PubMed
https://www.healthline.com/health/dr/sleep-deprivation/sleep-debt | Sleep Debt: What It Means for Your Health and How You Can Pay It Off
https://www.health.harvard.edu/blog/weekend-catch-up-sleep-wont-fix-the-effects-of-sleep-deprivation-on-your-waistline-2019092417861 | 
https://www.sleepfoundation.org/sleep-deprivation | Sleep Deprivation: Symptoms, Treatment, \u0026 Effects
https://www.sleepfoundation.org/how-sleep-works/sleep-debt-and-catch-up-sleep | Sleep Debt: The Hidden Cost of Insufficient Rest
https://www.verywellhealth.com/what-is-sleep-debt-and-can-you-catch-up-on-it-3015091#:~:text=Many%20people%20catch%20up%20on,reduce%20an%20accumulated%20sleep%20debt. | 
https://www.webmd.com/sleep-disorders/what-is-sleep-debt | Sleep Debt: What Is It, Consequences, and More
https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/fact-or-fiction-can-you-catch-up-on-sleep/ | 
https://www.nhlbi.nih.gov/health/sleep-deprivation/how-much-sleep#:~:text=If%20you%20regularly%20lose%20sleep,nap%20to%20deal%20with%20sleepiness. | 
https://www.cite.com.my/product_info.php?products_id=1425854 | 究極休息術：重新設定身心的30天休息計畫 - 城邦阅读花园

item.title: 7.27]墜入愛河需要多久？心理學家：問他這36道問題！【戀愛心理學】
item.itunes:title: 7.27]墜入愛河需要多久？心理學家：問他這36道問題！【戀愛心理學】
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=73pJFw6bkuw 原文問題（英文） https://ggia.berkeley.edu/?ACT=141\u0026path=practice%2Fpractice_as_pdf%2F36_questions_for_increasing_closeness\u0026size=Letter\u0026orientation=portrait\u0026key=\u0026attachment=1\u0026compress=1\u0026filename=practice_36_questions_for_increasing_closeness.pdf\u0026default_font= | 36 Questions for Increasing Closeness - Greater Good in Action ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 我的網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:03 故事 06:37 36題產生親密 08:54 什麼原理？真的只需36道題？ 11:48 結語 12:20 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://ggia.berkeley.edu/?ACT=141\u0026path=practice%2Fpractice_as_pdf%2F36_questions_for_increasing_closeness\u0026size=Letter\u0026orientation=portrait\u0026key=\u0026attachment=1\u0026compress=1\u0026filename=practice_36_questions_for_increasing_closeness.pdf\u0026default_font= | 36 Questions for Increasing Closeness - Greater Good in Action https://www.telegraph.co.uk/women/life/can-36-questions-make-fall-stay-love-anyone/ | Can 36 questions make you fall - and stay - in love with anyone? https://www.nytimes.com/2015/01/11/style/modern-love-to-fall-in-love-with-anyone-do-this.html | To Fall in Love With Anyone, Do This - The New York Times https://www.psychologytoday.com/intl/blog/attending-the-undervalued-self/201501/36-questions-intimacy-back-story | 36 Questions for Intimacy, Back Story | Psychology Today https://news.berkeley.edu/2015/02/12/love-in-the-lab/ | Creating love in the lab: The 36 questions that spark intimacy - Berkeley News https://www.rnz.co.nz/national/programmes/queensbirthday/audio/201803435/how-to-fall-in-love-dr-arthur-aron | How to fall in love: Dr. Arthur Aron | RNZ https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/pdf/10.1177/0146167297234003 | The Experimental Generation of Interpersonal Closeness: A Procedure and Some Preliminary Findings https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6sbBv08e_7A | (2) How to Fall in Love with Anyone | Mandy Catron | Talks at Google - YouTube https://www.nytimes.com/2015/01/09/style/no-37-big-wedding-or-small.html | The 36 Questions That Lead to Love - The New York Times https://www.verywellmind.com/unpacking-the-36-questions-that-lead-to-love-8559179 | Unpacking the 36 Questions That Lead to Love: Why and How They Work https://www.universityofcalifornia.edu/news/creating-love-lab-36-questions-spark-intimacy | Creating love in the lab: The 36 questions that spark intimacy | University of California https://www.scientificamerican.com/podcast/episode/love-and-the-brain-part-1-the-36-questions-revisited/ | Love and the Brain, Part 1: The 36 Questions, Revisited | Scientific American
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=73pJFw6bkuw 原文問題（英文） https://ggia.berkeley.edu/?ACT=141\u0026path=practice%2Fpractice_as_pdf%2F36_questions_for_increasing_closeness\u0026size=Letter\u0026orientation=portrait\u0026key=\u0026attachment=1\u0026compress=1\u0026filename=practice_36_questions_for_increasing_closeness.pdf\u0026default_font= | 36 Questions for Increasing Closeness - Greater Good in Action ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 我的網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:03 故事 06:37 36題產生親密 08:54 什麼原理？真的只需36道題？ 11:48 結語 12:20 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://ggia.berkeley.edu/?ACT=141\u0026path=practice%2Fpractice_as_pdf%2F36_questions_for_increasing_closeness\u0026size=Letter\u0026orientation=portrait\u0026key=\u0026attachment=1\u0026compress=1\u0026filename=practice_36_questions_for_increasing_closeness.pdf\u0026default_font= | 36 Questions for Increasing Closeness - Greater Good in Action https://www.telegraph.co.uk/women/life/can-36-questions-make-fall-stay-love-anyone/ | Can 36 questions make you fall - and stay - in love with anyone? https://www.nytimes.com/2015/01/11/style/modern-love-to-fall-in-love-with-anyone-do-this.html | To Fall in Love With Anyone, Do This - The New York Times https://www.psychologytoday.com/intl/blog/attending-the-undervalued-self/201501/36-questions-intimacy-back-story | 36 Questions for Intimacy, Back Story | Psychology Today https://news.berkeley.edu/2015/02/12/love-in-the-lab/ | Creating love in the lab: The 36 questions that spark intimacy - Berkeley News https://www.rnz.co.nz/national/programmes/queensbirthday/audio/201803435/how-to-fall-in-love-dr-arthur-aron | How to fall in love: Dr. Arthur Aron | RNZ https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/pdf/10.1177/0146167297234003 | The Experimental Generation of Interpersonal Closeness: A Procedure and Some Preliminary Findings https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6sbBv08e_7A | (2) How to Fall in Love with Anyone | Mandy Catron | Talks at Google - YouTube https://www.nytimes.com/2015/01/09/style/no-37-big-wedding-or-small.html | The 36 Questions That Lead to Love - The New York Times https://www.verywellmind.com/unpacking-the-36-questions-that-lead-to-love-8559179 | Unpacking the 36 Questions That Lead to Love: Why and How They Work https://www.universityofcalifornia.edu/news/creating-love-lab-36-questions-spark-intimacy | Creating love in the lab: The 36 questions that spark intimacy | University of California https://www.scientificamerican.com/podcast/episode/love-and-the-brain-part-1-the-36-questions-revisited/ | Love and the Brain, Part 1: The 36 Questions, Revisited | Scientific American
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=73pJFw6bkuw
原文問題（英文）
https://ggia.berkeley.edu/?ACT=141\u0026path=practice%2Fpractice_as_pdf%2F36_questions_for_increasing_closeness\u0026size=Letter\u0026orientation=portrait\u0026key=\u0026attachment=1\u0026compress=1\u0026filename=practice_36_questions_for_increasing_closeness.pdf\u0026default_font= | 36 Questions for Increasing Closeness - Greater Good in Action
------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

我的網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

【目錄】
00:00 引言
01:03 故事
06:37 36題產生親密
08:54 什麼原理？真的只需36道題？
11:48 結語
12:20 精選留言
----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】

Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://ggia.berkeley.edu/?ACT=141\u0026path=practice%2Fpractice_as_pdf%2F36_questions_for_increasing_closeness\u0026size=Letter\u0026orientation=portrait\u0026key=\u0026attachment=1\u0026compress=1\u0026filename=practice_36_questions_for_increasing_closeness.pdf\u0026default_font= | 36 Questions for Increasing Closeness - Greater Good in Action
https://www.telegraph.co.uk/women/life/can-36-questions-make-fall-stay-love-anyone/ | Can 36 questions make you fall - and stay - in love with anyone?
https://www.nytimes.com/2015/01/11/style/modern-love-to-fall-in-love-with-anyone-do-this.html | To Fall in Love With Anyone, Do This - The New York Times
https://www.psychologytoday.com/intl/blog/attending-the-undervalued-self/201501/36-questions-intimacy-back-story | 36 Questions for Intimacy, Back Story | Psychology Today
https://news.berkeley.edu/2015/02/12/love-in-the-lab/ | Creating love in the lab: The 36 questions that spark intimacy - Berkeley News
https://www.rnz.co.nz/national/programmes/queensbirthday/audio/201803435/how-to-fall-in-love-dr-arthur-aron | How to fall in love: Dr. Arthur Aron | RNZ
https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/pdf/10.1177/0146167297234003 | The Experimental Generation of Interpersonal Closeness: A Procedure and Some Preliminary Findings
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6sbBv08e_7A | (2) How to Fall in Love with Anyone | Mandy Catron | Talks at Google - YouTube
https://www.nytimes.com/2015/01/09/style/no-37-big-wedding-or-small.html | The 36 Questions That Lead to Love - The New York Times
https://www.verywellmind.com/unpacking-the-36-questions-that-lead-to-love-8559179 | Unpacking the 36 Questions That Lead to Love: Why and How They Work
https://www.universityofcalifornia.edu/news/creating-love-lab-36-questions-spark-intimacy | Creating love in the lab: The 36 questions that spark intimacy | University of California
https://www.scientificamerican.com/podcast/episode/love-and-the-brain-part-1-the-36-questions-revisited/ | Love and the Brain, Part 1: The 36 Questions, Revisited | Scientific American

item.title: 7.13]教你3技巧繞過懶惰腦，馬上充滿動力！【心理學】
item.itunes:title: 7.13]教你3技巧繞過懶惰腦，馬上充滿動力！【心理學】
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tHgrGsU94Sg 你曾經欺騙過你的大腦去執行某個事情嗎？ 是不是不做不知道，一做停不下來呢？這就是在我們大腦中一個隱藏的驅動力，有一些心理技巧可以幫我們做到這一點。 你可能也喜歡： https://youtu.be/UP0UrEYCOS0 https://youtu.be/w24ktmHyPpo ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:16 動機 02:41 動機6 階段 05:50 如何打開聽歌開關 08:34 如何騙大腦做困難的事 13:49 總結 ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7sxpKhIbr0E | The psychology of self-motivation | Scott Geller | TEDxVirginiaTech - YouTube https://www.verywellmind.com/what-is-self-determination-theory-2795387 | Self-Determination Theory: How It Explains Motivation https://www.verywellmind.com/differences-between-extrinsic-and-intrinsic-motivation-2795384 | Intrinsic vs. Extrinsic Motivation: What's the Difference? https://positivepsychology.com/self-determination-theory/ | Self Determination Theory and How It Explains Motivation https://www.verywellmind.com/what-is-the-overjustification-effect-2795386 | Overjustification Effect and Motivation https://helpfulprofessor.com/self-determination-theory/ | Self Determination Theory of Motivation, Explained! (2024)
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tHgrGsU94Sg 你曾經欺騙過你的大腦去執行某個事情嗎？ 是不是不做不知道，一做停不下來呢？這就是在我們大腦中一個隱藏的驅動力，有一些心理技巧可以幫我們做到這一點。 你可能也喜歡： https://youtu.be/UP0UrEYCOS0 https://youtu.be/w24ktmHyPpo ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:16 動機 02:41 動機6 階段 05:50 如何打開聽歌開關 08:34 如何騙大腦做困難的事 13:49 總結 ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7sxpKhIbr0E | The psychology of self-motivation | Scott Geller | TEDxVirginiaTech - YouTube https://www.verywellmind.com/what-is-self-determination-theory-2795387 | Self-Determination Theory: How It Explains Motivation https://www.verywellmind.com/differences-between-extrinsic-and-intrinsic-motivation-2795384 | Intrinsic vs. Extrinsic Motivation: What's the Difference? https://positivepsychology.com/self-determination-theory/ | Self Determination Theory and How It Explains Motivation https://www.verywellmind.com/what-is-the-overjustification-effect-2795386 | Overjustification Effect and Motivation https://helpfulprofessor.com/self-determination-theory/ | Self Determination Theory of Motivation, Explained! (2024)
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tHgrGsU94Sg
你曾經欺騙過你的大腦去執行某個事情嗎？ 是不是不做不知道，一做停不下來呢？這就是在我們大腦中一個隱藏的驅動力，有一些心理技巧可以幫我們做到這一點。

你可能也喜歡：
 https://youtu.be/UP0UrEYCOS0
https://youtu.be/w24ktmHyPpo

------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

【目錄】
00:00 介紹
01:16 動機
02:41 動機6 階段
05:50 如何打開聽歌開關
08:34 如何騙大腦做困難的事
13:49 總結

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7sxpKhIbr0E | The psychology of self-motivation | Scott Geller | TEDxVirginiaTech - YouTube
https://www.verywellmind.com/what-is-self-determination-theory-2795387 | Self-Determination Theory: How It Explains Motivation
https://www.verywellmind.com/differences-between-extrinsic-and-intrinsic-motivation-2795384 | Intrinsic vs. Extrinsic Motivation: What's the Difference?
https://positivepsychology.com/self-determination-theory/ | Self Determination Theory and How It Explains Motivation
https://www.verywellmind.com/what-is-the-overjustification-effect-2795386 | Overjustification Effect and Motivation
https://helpfulprofessor.com/self-determination-theory/ | Self Determination Theory of Motivation, Explained! (2024)

item.title: 6.22]為什麼你不該相信，支持自己觀點的信息？
item.itunes:title: 6.22]為什麼你不該相信，支持自己觀點的信息？
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1a161fxsk4 為什麼人們會相信假信息？其實，這背後有六大心理學因素。首先，確認偏誤讓我們只相信支持自己觀點的信息。可得性啟發讓我們依賴最快浮現的資訊判斷事情。情緒偏誤則讓我們相信引起強烈情緒反應的信息。團體迷思讓我們盲從群體的觀點。認知失調會讓我們拒絕矛盾的信息，保護內心的和諧。最後，記憶的可塑性讓假信息在反复出现后变得真实。了解这些心理学，帮助我们更好地识别假信息，保护自己。 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD ---------------------------- 【我的平台】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:47 魔彈論 03:01 假信息事件 04:03 確認偏誤 05:28 可得性啟發 07:20 情緒偏誤 08:17 團體迷思 10:00 認知失調 11:30 記憶的可塑性 13:32 結語 ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.investopedia.com/terms/w/web-20.asp#:~:text=Key%20Takeaways-,Web%202.0%20describes%20the%20current%20state%20of%20the%20internet%2C%20which,how%20the%20internet%20is%20used. | What Is Web 2.0? Definition, Impact, and Examples https://positivepsychology.com/cognitive-biases/ | What Is Cognitive Bias? 7 Examples \u0026 Resources (Incl. Codex) https://www.bls.gov/iif/fatal-injuries-tables/fatal-occupational-injuries-table-a-1-2021.htm | TABLE A-1. Fatal occupational injuries by industry and event or exposure, all United States, 2021 : U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics https://www.bls.gov/news.release/cfoi.nr0.htm | Census of Fatal Occupational Injuries Summary, 2022 - 2022 A01 Results https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3402138/ | Memory's Malleability: Its Role in Shaping Collective Memory and Social Identity - PMC https://thedecisionlab.com/biases/availability-heuristic | Availability Heuristic - The Decision Lab https://www.sciencedirect.com/topics/medicine-and-dentistry/emotional-bias#:~:text=Emotional%20biases%20originate%20from%20the,greedy%20when%20others%20are%20fearful. | Emotional Bias - an overview | ScienceDirect Topics https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%9C%98%E9%AB%94%E8%BF%B7%E6%80%9D | 團體迷思 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://medium.com/los-psychology/%E5%BF%83%E7%90%86%E5%AD%B8%E8%AA%B2%E5%A0%82-%E8%AA%8D%E7%9F%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%AA%BF%E7%90%86%E8%AB%96-cognitive-dissonance-theory-%E7%B6%93%E5%85%B8%E5%AF%A6%E9%A9%97-502de29cd54b | 心理學課堂: 認知失調理論(Cognitive Dissonance Theory)經典實驗 | by Dr. Lo, Ph.D.(H.K.), CPsychol (BPS) | Dr Lo Psychology 達樂心理 | Medium
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1a161fxsk4 為什麼人們會相信假信息？其實，這背後有六大心理學因素。首先，確認偏誤讓我們只相信支持自己觀點的信息。可得性啟發讓我們依賴最快浮現的資訊判斷事情。情緒偏誤則讓我們相信引起強烈情緒反應的信息。團體迷思讓我們盲從群體的觀點。認知失調會讓我們拒絕矛盾的信息，保護內心的和諧。最後，記憶的可塑性讓假信息在反复出现后变得真实。了解这些心理学，帮助我们更好地识别假信息，保护自己。 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD ---------------------------- 【我的平台】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 00:47 魔彈論 03:01 假信息事件 04:03 確認偏誤 05:28 可得性啟發 07:20 情緒偏誤 08:17 團體迷思 10:00 認知失調 11:30 記憶的可塑性 13:32 結語 ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.investopedia.com/terms/w/web-20.asp#:~:text=Key%20Takeaways-,Web%202.0%20describes%20the%20current%20state%20of%20the%20internet%2C%20which,how%20the%20internet%20is%20used. | What Is Web 2.0? Definition, Impact, and Examples https://positivepsychology.com/cognitive-biases/ | What Is Cognitive Bias? 7 Examples \u0026 Resources (Incl. Codex) https://www.bls.gov/iif/fatal-injuries-tables/fatal-occupational-injuries-table-a-1-2021.htm | TABLE A-1. Fatal occupational injuries by industry and event or exposure, all United States, 2021 : U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics https://www.bls.gov/news.release/cfoi.nr0.htm | Census of Fatal Occupational Injuries Summary, 2022 - 2022 A01 Results https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3402138/ | Memory's Malleability: Its Role in Shaping Collective Memory and Social Identity - PMC https://thedecisionlab.com/biases/availability-heuristic | Availability Heuristic - The Decision Lab https://www.sciencedirect.com/topics/medicine-and-dentistry/emotional-bias#:~:text=Emotional%20biases%20originate%20from%20the,greedy%20when%20others%20are%20fearful. | Emotional Bias - an overview | ScienceDirect Topics https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%9C%98%E9%AB%94%E8%BF%B7%E6%80%9D | 團體迷思 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://medium.com/los-psychology/%E5%BF%83%E7%90%86%E5%AD%B8%E8%AA%B2%E5%A0%82-%E8%AA%8D%E7%9F%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%AA%BF%E7%90%86%E8%AB%96-cognitive-dissonance-theory-%E7%B6%93%E5%85%B8%E5%AF%A6%E9%A9%97-502de29cd54b | 心理學課堂: 認知失調理論(Cognitive Dissonance Theory)經典實驗 | by Dr. Lo, Ph.D.(H.K.), CPsychol (BPS) | Dr Lo Psychology 達樂心理 | Medium
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1a161fxsk4
為什麼人們會相信假信息？其實，這背後有六大心理學因素。首先，確認偏誤讓我們只相信支持自己觀點的信息。可得性啟發讓我們依賴最快浮現的資訊判斷事情。情緒偏誤則讓我們相信引起強烈情緒反應的信息。團體迷思讓我們盲從群體的觀點。認知失調會讓我們拒絕矛盾的信息，保護內心的和諧。最後，記憶的可塑性讓假信息在反复出现后变得真实。了解这些心理学，帮助我们更好地识别假信息，保护自己。

官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

----------------------------
【我的平台】
Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【目錄】
00:00 介紹
00:47 魔彈論
03:01 假信息事件
04:03 確認偏誤
05:28 可得性啟發
07:20 情緒偏誤
08:17 團體迷思
10:00 認知失調
11:30 記憶的可塑性
13:32 結語

----------------------------
【推薦你的影片】
你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd
為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM
如何控制夢？   ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l
為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh
失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT
你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://www.investopedia.com/terms/w/web-20.asp#:~:text=Key%20Takeaways-,Web%202.0%20describes%20the%20current%20state%20of%20the%20internet%2C%20which,how%20the%20internet%20is%20used. | What Is Web 2.0? Definition, Impact, and Examples
https://positivepsychology.com/cognitive-biases/ | What Is Cognitive Bias? 7 Examples \u0026 Resources (Incl. Codex)
https://www.bls.gov/iif/fatal-injuries-tables/fatal-occupational-injuries-table-a-1-2021.htm | TABLE A-1. Fatal occupational injuries by industry and event or exposure, all United States, 2021 : U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics
https://www.bls.gov/news.release/cfoi.nr0.htm | Census of Fatal Occupational Injuries Summary, 2022 - 2022 A01 Results
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3402138/ | Memory's Malleability: Its Role in Shaping Collective Memory and Social Identity - PMC
https://thedecisionlab.com/biases/availability-heuristic | Availability Heuristic - The Decision Lab
https://www.sciencedirect.com/topics/medicine-and-dentistry/emotional-bias#:~:text=Emotional%20biases%20originate%20from%20the,greedy%20when%20others%20are%20fearful. | Emotional Bias - an overview | ScienceDirect Topics
https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%9C%98%E9%AB%94%E8%BF%B7%E6%80%9D | 團體迷思 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書
https://medium.com/los-psychology/%E5%BF%83%E7%90%86%E5%AD%B8%E8%AA%B2%E5%A0%82-%E8%AA%8D%E7%9F%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%AA%BF%E7%90%86%E8%AB%96-cognitive-dissonance-theory-%E7%B6%93%E5%85%B8%E5%AF%A6%E9%A9%97-502de29cd54b | 心理學課堂: 認知失調理論(Cognitive Dissonance Theory)經典實驗 | by Dr. Lo, Ph.D.(H.K.), CPsychol (BPS) | Dr Lo Psychology 達樂心理 | Medium

item.title: 6.15]你什麼時候產生了，沒被洗腦的錯覺？最難發覺的洗腦效應！
item.itunes:title: 6.15]你什麼時候產生了，沒被洗腦的錯覺？最難發覺的洗腦效應！
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lXQjXLsLNB0 點擊這裡查看NordVPN 獨家優惠： https://nordvpn.com/weic 免費體驗30天，退款保證，零風險！ 你知道台灣中秋節烤肉並不是傳統嗎？這全是出自於一個廣告。我們先從睡眠者效應開始講起。 ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:45 睡眠者效應實驗 03:36 工商服務 05:17 什麼是睡眠者效應 07:26 為何中秋節要烤肉？ 08:38 帶來什麼影響？ 11:46 你是否中了？ 13:46 結語 15:14 精選留言+ 記得分享喔 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://journal.psych.ac.cn/xlkxjz/CN/abstract/abstract464.shtml | 态度改变的睡眠者效应研究概述 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sleeper_effect | Sleeper effect - Wikipedia https://wiki.mbalib.com/zh-tw/%E7%9D%A1%E7%9C%A0%E8%80%85%E6%95%88%E5%BA%94 | 睡眠者效應 - MBA智库百科 http://chinese.nchu.edu.tw/files/users/189/40-6.pdf | Microsoft Word - 1時變、權變、世變--論《史記》_之「變」106.01.04 https://psychology.iresearchnet.com/social-psychology/social-influence/sleeper-effect/ | Sleeper Effect - iResearchNet https://www.taipeitimes.com/News/lang/archives/2018/09/25/2003701075 | Secret sauce: The surprising origins of Taiwan’s Mid-Autumn Festival barbecue craze 神秘的烤肉醬—令人驚訝的台灣中秋節「烤肉瘋」由來 - Taipei Times https://mr6.cc/2010/12/01/%e7%9d%a1%e7%9c%a0%e8%80%85%e6%95%88%e6%87%89sleeper-effect%ef%bc%9a%e7%95%b6%e4%b8%8b%e8%a2%ab%e6%8b%92%e7%b5%95%ef%bc%8c%e4%bd%86%e5%85%b6%e5%af%a6%e5%b7%b2%e7%b6%93%e6%88%90%e5%8a%9f%e4%ba%86/ | 睡眠者效應(Sleeper Effect)：當下被拒絕，但其實已經成功了 – Mr. 6 – 趨勢．創業．網路．生活 https://www.spring.org.uk/2023/02/sleeper-effect-psychology.php | Sleeper Effect In Psychology: Why Persuasion Takes Time - PsyBlog https://newcongress.tw/?p=14071 | 你醒來了嗎？ — 淺談謠言與睡眠者效應 - 新公民議會 https://reputationtoday.in/beware-of-the-sleeper-effect/ | Beware of the Sleeper Effect - Reputation Today https://www.woshipm.com/pmd/449112.html | 睡眠效应：做产品的你知道吗？ | 人人都是产品经理 https://www.thenewslens.com/article/86669 | 越抗拒越難忘：弔詭的「睡眠者效應」 - TNL The News Lens 關鍵評論網 https://www.koob.com.tw/video/3891 | 啟點線上學苑 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3100161/ | The Sleeper Effect in Persuasion: A Meta-Analytic Review - PMC https://www.youtube.com/shorts/40suBw4AFb4 | (1) 散播假新聞的人是什麼心態？ #假新聞 #ai - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-JNeBKlG0cI | (1) 台灣媒體是怎麼爛掉的？七分鐘看懂媒體亂象五大關鍵！【記者真心話】Vol.1｜懶人包 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3tfy3yMnS78 | (1) 台灣媒體的下限能有多低？ - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bs41Dla6qW4 | (1) 抹黑造謠、斷章取義...台灣媒體為何這麼亂？新聞亂寫，NCC 都管不了？《 志祺今天不讀稿 》EP018｜志祺七七 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4oyZCXKBphs | 兩位苦主現身! 轟：台灣媒體標題殺、斷章取義! - YouTube https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/2024%E5%B9%B4%E5%85%A8%E5%9B%BD%E6%80%A7%E9%80%89%E4%B8%BE%E6%97%A5%E5%8E%86 | 2024年全國性選舉日曆 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://www.politico.eu/article/eu-elections-online-disinformation-politics/ | 2024 may be the year online disinformation finally gets the better of us – POLITICO https://www.ptt.cc/bbs/FITNESS/M.1549241446.A.666.html | [新聞] 科學證實：吃炸薯條比沙拉健康 - 看板 FITNESS - 批踢踢實業坊 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2h9eXfGois0\u0026t=22s | 【Joeman】入圍七項卻全部槓龜的夜晚 - YouTube https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E4%B9%9D%E5%A6%B9%E8%B5%B0%E9%90%98%E7%8D%8E%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%8D%E4%B8%83%E9%A0%85%E5%85%A8%E6%A7%93%E9%BE%9C-%E6%B7%9A%E5%B4%A9%E7%97%9B%E8%A8%B4-%E4%B8%BB%E8%BE%A6%E5%96%AE%E4%BD%8D%E5%88%A5%E5%86%8D%E9%A8%99%E7%B2%89%E7%B5%B2%E9%8C%A2-161504640.html | 九妹走鐘獎入圍七項全槓龜！淚崩痛訴：主辦單位別再騙粉絲錢
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lXQjXLsLNB0 點擊這裡查看NordVPN 獨家優惠： https://nordvpn.com/weic 免費體驗30天，退款保證，零風險！ 你知道台灣中秋節烤肉並不是傳統嗎？這全是出自於一個廣告。我們先從睡眠者效應開始講起。 ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:45 睡眠者效應實驗 03:36 工商服務 05:17 什麼是睡眠者效應 07:26 為何中秋節要烤肉？ 08:38 帶來什麼影響？ 11:46 你是否中了？ 13:46 結語 15:14 精選留言+ 記得分享喔 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://journal.psych.ac.cn/xlkxjz/CN/abstract/abstract464.shtml | 态度改变的睡眠者效应研究概述 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sleeper_effect | Sleeper effect - Wikipedia https://wiki.mbalib.com/zh-tw/%E7%9D%A1%E7%9C%A0%E8%80%85%E6%95%88%E5%BA%94 | 睡眠者效應 - MBA智库百科 http://chinese.nchu.edu.tw/files/users/189/40-6.pdf | Microsoft Word - 1時變、權變、世變--論《史記》_之「變」106.01.04 https://psychology.iresearchnet.com/social-psychology/social-influence/sleeper-effect/ | Sleeper Effect - iResearchNet https://www.taipeitimes.com/News/lang/archives/2018/09/25/2003701075 | Secret sauce: The surprising origins of Taiwan’s Mid-Autumn Festival barbecue craze 神秘的烤肉醬—令人驚訝的台灣中秋節「烤肉瘋」由來 - Taipei Times https://mr6.cc/2010/12/01/%e7%9d%a1%e7%9c%a0%e8%80%85%e6%95%88%e6%87%89sleeper-effect%ef%bc%9a%e7%95%b6%e4%b8%8b%e8%a2%ab%e6%8b%92%e7%b5%95%ef%bc%8c%e4%bd%86%e5%85%b6%e5%af%a6%e5%b7%b2%e7%b6%93%e6%88%90%e5%8a%9f%e4%ba%86/ | 睡眠者效應(Sleeper Effect)：當下被拒絕，但其實已經成功了 – Mr. 6 – 趨勢．創業．網路．生活 https://www.spring.org.uk/2023/02/sleeper-effect-psychology.php | Sleeper Effect In Psychology: Why Persuasion Takes Time - PsyBlog https://newcongress.tw/?p=14071 | 你醒來了嗎？ — 淺談謠言與睡眠者效應 - 新公民議會 https://reputationtoday.in/beware-of-the-sleeper-effect/ | Beware of the Sleeper Effect - Reputation Today https://www.woshipm.com/pmd/449112.html | 睡眠效应：做产品的你知道吗？ | 人人都是产品经理 https://www.thenewslens.com/article/86669 | 越抗拒越難忘：弔詭的「睡眠者效應」 - TNL The News Lens 關鍵評論網 https://www.koob.com.tw/video/3891 | 啟點線上學苑 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3100161/ | The Sleeper Effect in Persuasion: A Meta-Analytic Review - PMC https://www.youtube.com/shorts/40suBw4AFb4 | (1) 散播假新聞的人是什麼心態？ #假新聞 #ai - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-JNeBKlG0cI | (1) 台灣媒體是怎麼爛掉的？七分鐘看懂媒體亂象五大關鍵！【記者真心話】Vol.1｜懶人包 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3tfy3yMnS78 | (1) 台灣媒體的下限能有多低？ - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bs41Dla6qW4 | (1) 抹黑造謠、斷章取義...台灣媒體為何這麼亂？新聞亂寫，NCC 都管不了？《 志祺今天不讀稿 》EP018｜志祺七七 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4oyZCXKBphs | 兩位苦主現身! 轟：台灣媒體標題殺、斷章取義! - YouTube https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/2024%E5%B9%B4%E5%85%A8%E5%9B%BD%E6%80%A7%E9%80%89%E4%B8%BE%E6%97%A5%E5%8E%86 | 2024年全國性選舉日曆 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://www.politico.eu/article/eu-elections-online-disinformation-politics/ | 2024 may be the year online disinformation finally gets the better of us – POLITICO https://www.ptt.cc/bbs/FITNESS/M.1549241446.A.666.html | [新聞] 科學證實：吃炸薯條比沙拉健康 - 看板 FITNESS - 批踢踢實業坊 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2h9eXfGois0\u0026t=22s | 【Joeman】入圍七項卻全部槓龜的夜晚 - YouTube https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E4%B9%9D%E5%A6%B9%E8%B5%B0%E9%90%98%E7%8D%8E%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%8D%E4%B8%83%E9%A0%85%E5%85%A8%E6%A7%93%E9%BE%9C-%E6%B7%9A%E5%B4%A9%E7%97%9B%E8%A8%B4-%E4%B8%BB%E8%BE%A6%E5%96%AE%E4%BD%8D%E5%88%A5%E5%86%8D%E9%A8%99%E7%B2%89%E7%B5%B2%E9%8C%A2-161504640.html | 九妹走鐘獎入圍七項全槓龜！淚崩痛訴：主辦單位別再騙粉絲錢
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lXQjXLsLNB0
點擊這裡查看NordVPN 獨家優惠：
https://nordvpn.com/weic
免費體驗30天，退款保證，零風險！

你知道台灣中秋節烤肉並不是傳統嗎？這全是出自於一個廣告。我們先從睡眠者效應開始講起。

------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 介紹
01:45 睡眠者效應實驗
03:36 工商服務
05:17 什麼是睡眠者效應
07:26 為何中秋節要烤肉？
08:38 帶來什麼影響？
11:46 你是否中了？
13:46 結語
15:14 精選留言+ 記得分享喔

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【推薦你的影片】
你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd
為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM
如何控制夢？   ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l
為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh
失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT
你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://journal.psych.ac.cn/xlkxjz/CN/abstract/abstract464.shtml | 态度改变的睡眠者效应研究概述
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sleeper_effect | Sleeper effect - Wikipedia
https://wiki.mbalib.com/zh-tw/%E7%9D%A1%E7%9C%A0%E8%80%85%E6%95%88%E5%BA%94 | 睡眠者效應 - MBA智库百科
http://chinese.nchu.edu.tw/files/users/189/40-6.pdf | Microsoft Word - 1時變、權變、世變--論《史記》_之「變」106.01.04
https://psychology.iresearchnet.com/social-psychology/social-influence/sleeper-effect/ | Sleeper Effect - iResearchNet
https://www.taipeitimes.com/News/lang/archives/2018/09/25/2003701075 | Secret sauce: The surprising origins of Taiwan’s Mid-Autumn Festival barbecue craze 神秘的烤肉醬—令人驚訝的台灣中秋節「烤肉瘋」由來 - Taipei Times
https://mr6.cc/2010/12/01/%e7%9d%a1%e7%9c%a0%e8%80%85%e6%95%88%e6%87%89sleeper-effect%ef%bc%9a%e7%95%b6%e4%b8%8b%e8%a2%ab%e6%8b%92%e7%b5%95%ef%bc%8c%e4%bd%86%e5%85%b6%e5%af%a6%e5%b7%b2%e7%b6%93%e6%88%90%e5%8a%9f%e4%ba%86/ | 睡眠者效應(Sleeper Effect)：當下被拒絕，但其實已經成功了 – Mr. 6 – 趨勢．創業．網路．生活
https://www.spring.org.uk/2023/02/sleeper-effect-psychology.php | Sleeper Effect In Psychology: Why Persuasion Takes Time - PsyBlog
https://newcongress.tw/?p=14071 | 你醒來了嗎？ — 淺談謠言與睡眠者效應 - 新公民議會
https://reputationtoday.in/beware-of-the-sleeper-effect/ | Beware of the Sleeper Effect - Reputation Today
https://www.woshipm.com/pmd/449112.html | 睡眠效应：做产品的你知道吗？ | 人人都是产品经理
https://www.thenewslens.com/article/86669 | 越抗拒越難忘：弔詭的「睡眠者效應」 - TNL The News Lens 關鍵評論網
https://www.koob.com.tw/video/3891 | 啟點線上學苑
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3100161/ | The Sleeper Effect in Persuasion: A Meta-Analytic Review - PMC
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/40suBw4AFb4 | (1) 散播假新聞的人是什麼心態？ #假新聞 #ai - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-JNeBKlG0cI | (1) 台灣媒體是怎麼爛掉的？七分鐘看懂媒體亂象五大關鍵！【記者真心話】Vol.1｜懶人包 - YouTube

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bs41Dla6qW4 | (1) 抹黑造謠、斷章取義...台灣媒體為何這麼亂？新聞亂寫，NCC 都管不了？《 志祺今天不讀稿 》EP018｜志祺七七 - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4oyZCXKBphs | 兩位苦主現身! 轟：台灣媒體標題殺、斷章取義! - YouTube
https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/2024%E5%B9%B4%E5%85%A8%E5%9B%BD%E6%80%A7%E9%80%89%E4%B8%BE%E6%97%A5%E5%8E%86 | 2024年全國性選舉日曆 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書
https://www.politico.eu/article/eu-elections-online-disinformation-politics/ | 2024 may be the year online disinformation finally gets the better of us – POLITICO

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2h9eXfGois0\u0026t=22s | 【Joeman】入圍七項卻全部槓龜的夜晚 - YouTube
https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E4%B9%9D%E5%A6%B9%E8%B5%B0%E9%90%98%E7%8D%8E%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%8D%E4%B8%83%E9%A0%85%E5%85%A8%E6%A7%93%E9%BE%9C-%E6%B7%9A%E5%B4%A9%E7%97%9B%E8%A8%B4-%E4%B8%BB%E8%BE%A6%E5%96%AE%E4%BD%8D%E5%88%A5%E5%86%8D%E9%A8%99%E7%B2%89%E7%B5%B2%E9%8C%A2-161504640.html | 九妹走鐘獎入圍七項全槓龜！淚崩痛訴：主辦單位別再騙粉絲錢
